title: LEND $HYPE with @hyperlendx
summary_title: Hyperland: Building DeFi Infrastructure on Hyperliquid's EVM
summary_description: Ness explains how Hyperland brings lending, borrowing, and yield strategies to Hyperliquid EVM with 30M TVL and upcoming token launch.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Hyperland and Ness, first NFT project on Hyperliquid
Ness shares his journey: ex-Big Pharma founder, early crypto investor since 2020, Olympus fan
Ness explains Hyperland vision: enabling HLP as collateral for BTC/ETH futures trades
Hyperland as Aave for Hyperliquid EVM with portfolio margin and cross-asset collateral
Current products: lending, borrowing HYPE and staked HYPE; 30M TVL cap due to EVM liquidity constraints
Pre-compiles integration: collateralizing HLP vault, using perps as collateral, yield-bearing strategies
Vault strategies: looping for 50-60% yield on stables, hype LST combinations, points and token staking
Call to action: join Discord for cap lifts, play poker/bingo, DMs open for feedback
